q: __________ washed my car? – Sarah did.
__________ did you do last weekend? – I went to the park.
__________ helped you with your homework? – My brother did.
__________ book do you want, this one or that one? – This one.
__________ did she meet at the station? – She met her teacher.
__________ is your favorite food? – Pizza.
__________ broke the window? – A boy from my class did.
__________ color do you like more, blue or green? – Blue.
__________ did you invite to the party? – I invited Jane.
__________ is your dream? – To be a pilot.
__________ is calling you now? – My mom is.
__________ pencil is yours, the red one or the black one? – The red one.
__________ did he buy at the store? – He bought some milk.
__________ did you see in the classroom? – I saw Mr. Lee.
__________ student won the prize, Tom or Alex? – Alex did.
__________ made this sandwich? – I did.
__________ do you want for your birthday? – A new bike.
__________ teacher do you like more, Mr. Kim or Ms. Park? – Ms. Park.
__________ did she talk to after class? – She talked to her friend.
__________ is responsible for the mistake? – John is.
